1000625739.english: - A moment after Spriggan's opening declaration, the first participant came forward.
1000625739.korean: - 스프리건의 개막 선언 뒤 잠시 후, 첫 번째 참가자가 앞으로 나왔다.

1000625741.english: - The audience stirred at Sleipnir's appearance. I guess everyone was thinking the same thing as me.
1000625741.korean: - 슬레이프니르의 등장에 관객석이 술렁였다. 다들 나와 같은 생각을 하는 거겠지.

1000625745.english: The underwater swimming continues for a long time! Is it because they are actively trying to utilize their body, which is close to flat?
1000625745.korean: 잠영이 길게 이어지는데요! 평면에 가까운 몸을 적극 이용하려는 걸까요!

1000625746.english: - Sleipnir did not raise his head above the water for a long time.
1000625746.korean: - 슬레이프니르는 한참이 지나도 물 밖으로 머리를 내밀지 않았다.

1000625747.english: - An ominous murmur began to spread through the audience, and Spriggan soon realized what was happening.
1000625747.korean: - 관객석에 불길한 웅성거림이 퍼지기 시작하고, 스프리건도 이내 상황을 파악했다.

1000625751.english: - The rescued Sleipnir was carried to the tent where I was.
1000625751.korean: - 구조된 슬레이프니르는 내가 있는 천막까지 실려왔다.

1000625752.english: - He was unconscious, probably from drinking too much water. I decided to step forward.
1000625752.korean: - 물을 잔뜩 먹었는지 의식이 없는 상황. 일단 내가 나서기로 했다.

1000625754.english: - He blocked Sleipnir's nose while he was unconscious and brought his face closer.
1000625754.korean: - 정신을 잃은 슬레이프니르의 코를 막고 얼굴을 가까이 가져갔다.

1000625755.english: - The moment their lips were about to touch, Sleipnir's eyes suddenly flashed open.
1000625755.korean: - 입술이 맞닿으려는 순간, 돌연 슬레이프니르의 눈이 번쩍 뜨였다.

1000625757.english: - Sleipnir's face, which had been blankly staring at me for a while, heated up.
1000625757.korean: - 한동안 나를 멍하니 올려다보던 슬레이프니르의 얼굴이 화끈 달아올랐다.

1000625759.english: In broad daylight... and in front of everyone, you're trying to kiss me!
1000625759.korean: 대, 대낮에... 그것도 남들 다 보는데 키스를 하려고 하다니!

1000625762.english: - Sleipnir, his face flushed bright red, pushed me away and ran towards the clothes and equipment he had laid out on one side.
1000625762.korean: - 얼굴을 새빨갛게 물들인 슬레이프니르는 나를 밀어내고 한쪽에 벗어놓은 옷과 장비를 향해 달려갔다.

1000625763.english: - Sleipnir, who had been putting on his clothes, flew into the sky.
1000625763.korean: - 주섬주섬 옷을 챙겨입은 슬레이프니르가 하늘로 날아올랐다.

1000625764.english: - The moment I thought the figure that was looking at me with its cheeks puffed out had disappeared, a sonic boom swept over me as I sat there in a daze.
1000625764.korean: - 볼을 부풀리며 나를 바라보던 그 모습이 사라졌다 싶은 순간, 소닉붐이 망연하게 주저앉아 있는 나를 휩쓸었다.

1000625765.english: Alas! Sleipnir has left the field! This is an out-of-field elimination!
1000625765.korean: 아아! 슬레이프니르 선수가 경기장을 벗어났습니다! 이건 장외로 탈락이군요!

1000625766.english: - The game resumed after clearing the stands that had become a mess because of Sleipnir.
1000625766.korean: - 슬레이프니르 때문에 아수라장이 된 관객석을 정리하고 경기가 재개됐다.

1000625769.english: Haha... No matter what happens, I will win.
1000625769.korean: 후후... 무슨 일이 있어도 우승하고 말겠어요.

1000625770.english: Charlotte at the starting line! Now... let's go!
1000625770.korean: 출발점에 선 샬럿 선수! 자... 출발했습니다!

1000625771.english: Your Majesty~! Your Majesty's one week is mine~!

1000625772.english: Ah, Charlotte! You're so conscious of the Commander!
1000625772.korean: 아아, 샬럿 선수! 사령관님을 엄청 의식하고 있는데요!

1000625773.english: Aside from that! He's literally splitting the ocean with his fierce freestyle!
1000625773.korean: 그것과 별개로! 맹렬한 자유형으로 말 그대로 바다를 가르고 있습니다!

1000625774.english: Your Majesty, how about waving your hand?

1000625775.english: - Charlotte's eyes burned brightly as she waved her hand at Armand's invitation, who was sitting next to her.
1000625775.korean: - 옆에 앉아있던 아르망의 권유에 손을 흔들어주자, 샬럿의 두 눈이 이글거리며 타올랐다.

1000625776.english: Your Majesty...! You have spared me!

1000625777.english: Please wait just a moment~? I'll be— *cough*.

1000625778.english: Ah, how could this be! Overly conscious of the Commander, Charlotte crashes her head directly into the reef!
1000625778.korean: 아아, 이럴 수가! 과도하게 사령관님을 의식한 나머지 샬럿 선수, 암초에 그대로 머리를 부딪히고 맙니다!

1000625779.english: When I glanced at him, Armand stuck out his tongue slightly and feigned indifference.
1000625779.korean: - 슬쩍 시선을 주자 아르망을 살짝 혀를 내밀며 딴청을 부렸다.

1000625780.english: It looks like there is no danger to your life! That is a relief!

1000625782.english: At the same time as Spriggan was startled, the soldiers standing guard at a distance were seen moving busily.
1000625782.korean: - 스프리건이 놀라는 것과 동시에 멀찍이서 경계를 서던 대원들이 분주히 움직이는 것이 보였다.

1000625784.english: It is said that the AGS units that had been deactivated have started moving again.
1000625784.korean: 기동이 정지됐던 AGS들이 다시 움직이기 시작했다고 합니다.

1000625785.english: There aren't that many. The current security forces are sufficient to subdue them.
1000625785.korean: 그리 많진 않습니다. 현재 경비 병력으로도 충분히 제압할 수 있습니다.

1000625790.english: Wow, the swimming competition is in full swing! May I take a look?
1000625790.korean: 이야, 수영 대회가 한창이지 않습니까! 저도 구경해도 되겠습니까?

1000625791.english: I turned around, feeling like I wanted to clutch my forehead.
1000625791.korean: - 이마를 부여잡고 싶은 심정으로 뒤를 돌아보았다.

1000625792.english: As Vanilla, who had been waiting, stepped forward, the grotesque—no, Alfred—shocked him and waved his four hands.
1000625792.korean: - 마침 대기하고 있던 바닐라가 앞으로 나서자 괴기계, 아니 알프레드가 기겁을 하며 네 개의 손을 내저었다.

1000625793.english: Now, please wait a moment! I didn't mean any harm!
1000625793.korean: 자, 잠깐만 기다려주시지요! 나쁜 의도가 아니었습니다!

1000625794.english: As soon as I recaptured this body, the AGS units that had stopped functioning started moving again!
1000625794.korean: 제가 이 몸체를 탈환하니 기동을 정지했던 AGS들이 다시 움직이지 뭡니까!

1000625795.english: And then, seeing them head here to execute the last entered command!
1000625795.korean: 그리곤 마지막으로 입력된 명령을 수행하기 위해 이곳으로 향하는 것을 보고!

1000625796.english: Like a hero! I appeared intending to wipe them out!

1000625798.english: Then what was that strange thing?

1000625800.english: I hurried after you, but... since you all seem to have already taken care of the AGS, I wanted to play a little prank- Hyaaaaak?!
1000625800.korean: 서둘러 뒤쫓아 왔지만... AGS들은 이미 여러분께서 전부 처리하셨겠다, 살짝 장난을 치고 싶- 흐갸아아악?!

1000625803.english: Th-That's amazing...! To think there isn't even a scratch!

1000625804.english: Kuhuhu... Well, well, Miss Vanilla is no longer a match for me!
1000625804.korean: 쿠후후... 이거이거, 바닐라 양은 더이상 제 적수가 되지 못하시는군요!

1000625809.english: After a short while, Alfred had become surprisingly cooperative.
1000625809.korean: - 잠깐의 시간이 지나자 알프레드는 놀랍도록 협조적이 되어있었다.

1000625810.english: Alfred, with his shoulders slumped dejectedly, opened his mouth while mumbling.
1000625810.korean: - 시무룩하게 어깨를 축 늘어뜨린 알프레드가 웅얼거리며 입을 열었다.

1000625811.english: I just... wanted to ask you to take me with you.
1000625811.korean: 그냥... 저도 데려가 달라고 말씀드리고 싶었습니다.

1000625813.english: You will be leaving this island soon, and most of the villagers will likely follow you.
1000625813.korean: 인간님께서는 곧 이 섬을 떠나실테고, 마을 분들도 대부분 그걸 따라가시겠지요.

1000625814.english: Since we are not in a situation where we can disperse our forces, everyone plans to move together, with the exception of a small number of personnel remaining on the island.
1000625814.korean: - 전력을 분산시킬 상황이 아니니 섬에 남을 소수의 인원을 제외하고는 전부 같이 움직일 예정이다.

1000625815.english: If I'm going to ask to be taken along, shouldn't I at least earn my keep?
1000625815.korean: 저도 데려가 달라고 말씀드리려면, 어쨌든 밥값은 해야 하지 않겠습니까?

1000625816.english: Of course, I was a beautiful and excellent AI in the past, but I was not comparable to my successor, Robert.
1000625816.korean: 물론 저는 예전에도 아름답고 우수한 A.I.였습니다만, 제 성공작인 로버트에 비할바는 아니었습니다.

1000625818.english: That's right! We succeeded in recovering most of the information, computing power, and even the data!
1000625818.korean: 그렇습니다! 정보와 연산 능력, 데이터까지 대부분 살려내는데에 성공했지요!

1000625819.english: So that you, Human—no, Commander—can use it as much as you want!
1000625819.korean: 인간님, 아니 사령관님께서 얼마든지 이용할 수 있도록요!

1000625820.english: Kuhuhu, that is precisely one of the reasons I obtained this body!
1000625820.korean: 쿠후후, 이 몸을 얻은 것엔 바로 그 이유도 있지요!

1000625821.english: Well... shall we give it a try? Commander, would you hold out your hand for a moment?
1000625821.korean: 어디... 한 번 시험해 볼까요? 사령관님, 잠깐 손을 내밀어 주시겠습니까?

1000625822.english: One of the four arms carefully took my hand.
1000625822.korean: - 네 개의 팔 중 하나가 내 손을 조심스럽게 잡았다.

1000625824.english: No, I tried to catch it.

1000625825.english: The moment the cold metal lightly touched his fingertips, Alfred jumped up and screamed.
1000625825.korean: - 손 끝에 차가운 금속이 살짝 닿는 순간, 알프레드는 펄쩍 뛰며 비명을 질렀다.

1000625826.english: Ugh... I-I'm sorry. But I feel like I'm getting goosebumps from every single circuit!
1000625826.korean: 크윽... 죄, 죄송합니다. 그렇지만 회로 하나하나에 소름이 돋는 것 같단 말입니다!

1000625827.english: Commander, you wouldn't understand this feeling even if you died and came back to life!
1000625827.korean: 사령관님께선 이 느낌을 죽었다 깨어나도 모르시겠지요!

1000625828.english: Alfred scratched his whole body with his four arms.
1000625828.korean: - 알프레드는 네 개의 팔로 온 몸을 벅벅 긁었다.

1000625829.english: Ahem... but one thing is certain. My symptoms were in my mind, not my body!
1000625829.korean: 흠흠... 그래도 하나는 확실해졌습니다. 제 증상은 몸이 아니라 정신에 있었다는 것이지요!

1000625830.english: That is truly remarkable progress! I suppose we will be able to overcome it someday!
1000625830.korean: 그야말로 장족의 발전! 언젠가는 극복할 수 있겠군요!

1000625832.english: I had a feeling that Alfred cared deeply for Snow Feather and Sunny, but this confirms it.
1000625832.korean: - 알프레드가 스노우 페더와 써니를 끔찍하게 아낀다는 느낌은 받았었지만, 이걸로 확실해졌다.

1000625834.english: To be precise... it is because I couldn't even pat the heads of the children who were hurting themselves out of despair, even though they were right in front of me.
1000625834.korean: 정확히 말씀드리면... 실의에 빠져 스스로를 상처입히는 아이들을 눈 앞에 두고도 머리 한 번 쓰다듬어 줄 수 없었으니까요.

1000625835.english: Still... isn't the Commander here now?

1000625836.english: It seems that both Snow Feather and Sunny have opened their hearts to the Commander, so please take good care of them.
1000625836.korean: 스노우 페더 양도, 써니 양도 사령관님께 마음을 연 모양이니, 잘 부탁드립니다.

1000625837.english: Then I can relax! I'll have to explore the genes of new people!
1000625837.korean: 그러면 저는 마음 놓고! 새로운 분들의 유전자를 탐닉해봐야겠군요!

1000625838.english: Kuhuhu... I'm really looking forward to what kind of beauty awaits me...!
1000625838.korean: 쿠후후... 어떤 아름다움이 저를 기다리고 있을지 정말 기대됩니다...!

1000625839.english: Oh, no...! I absolutely cannot give up on this...!
1000625839.korean: 아, 안 됩니다...! 이것만은 절대로 포기할 수 없습니다...!

1000625840.english: - I asked a question that had been a constant question to the robot that looked so human.
1000625840.korean: - 너무나 인간적인 모습의 로봇에게 계속 의문이었던 질문을 던졌다.

1000625842.english: Oh my, look over there. It looks like they're going to start the swimming competition over again.
1000625842.korean: 어이쿠, 저기 좀 보십시오. 수영 대회를 처음부터 다시 시작하려는 모양이군요.

1000625843.english: - As I waited silently, Alfred, who had been acting strange for a while, looked at me.
1000625843.korean: - 말없이 기다리고 있자, 한동안 딴청을 부리던 알프레드가 나를 보았다.

1000625845.english: Of course, I know it as simple knowledge. I just need to input the data.
1000625845.korean: 단순한 지식으로써는 물론 알고 있습니다. 그냥 데이터를 입력받으면 되니까요.

1000625846.english: - Alfred's gaze turned to Snow Feather and Sunny, who were smiling brightly and talking next to Cerestia.
1000625846.korean: - 알프레드의 시선이 세레스티아의 곁에서 밝게 웃으며 이야기를 하고 있는 스노우 페더와 써니에게 향했다.

1000625847.english: - The expression on the front panel, which is a simple combination of data, exudes satisfaction.
1000625847.korean: - 단순한 데이터의 조합일터인 전면 패널의 표정에서 뿌듯함이 묻어나온다.

1000625849.english: Oh my, Miss Feather is calling. Come on!

1000625850.english: - Alfred, who had been walking ahead, stopped walking.
1000625850.korean: - 앞장 서서 걸어가던 알프레드가 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000625851.english: - Soon, from the front core, which was not suitable for its large size, an answer that could not be helped but be accepted to the question just now flowed out.
1000625851.korean: - 곧 커다란 덩치에 어울리지 않는 전면 코어에서 방금 전 물음에 대한, 납득할 수밖에 없는 대답이 흘러나왔다.

1000625852.english: I think it's only natural to want to help children who are desperately trying to save their loved ones.
1000625852.korean: 소중한 사람들을 구하기 위해 안간힘을 쓰는 아이들을 돕고 싶어지는 것은... 당연한 일이라고 생각합니다.

1000625855.english: < Aria of the Fairy Village > END.

1000625856.english: - Just as I was about to deal with the AGS without much difficulty and resume the swimming competition, I heard a familiar laugh.
1000625856.korean: - 큰 어려움 없이 AGS들을 처리하고 다시 수영 대회를 진행하려는 순간, 익숙한 웃음소리가 들려왔다.

1000625858.english: I let my guard down! You... my mission...!

1000625859.english: - You can see a familiar core attached to Robert's body.
1000625859.korean: - 로버트의 몸체에 익숙한 코어가 달려있는 것이 보인다.

1000625860.english: - Before I could tell the agents to remain on alert, the monster's movements stopped.
1000625860.korean: - 대원들에게 경계 태세를 유지하라는 말을 하기도 전에 괴기계의 움직임이 멎었다.

1000625862.english: What, something seems to have gone wrong... Hwaak?!
1000625862.korean: 뭐, 뭔가 문제가 생긴 것 같... 흐아악?!

1000625863.english: The forest was so dense, but you arrived so quickly.
1000625863.korean: 숲이 엄청 빽빽하던데 용케 빨리 왔네.

1000625865.english: At the scene for a moment... Huh?

1000625866.english: I can't see Snow Feather or Sunny either...

1000625867.english: First, let's clean up the scene.

1000625868.english: ...I think I know where it went.

1000625870.english: I was going to leave it to the doctor?

1000625873.english: So if there's a problem, you can tell right away?
1000625873.korean: 그래서 문제가 있으면 바로 알 수 있다는 건가?

1000625874.english: Can you do it right away?

1000625876.english: Our technical team will be working with you, along with the doctor, of course.
1000625876.korean: 우리 기술팀도 같이 진행할거야. 물론 닥터도.

1000625880.english: Some of the AGS have been reactivated. Any guesses?
1000625880.korean: AGS들 중 일부가 재기동했어. 혹시 짐작 가는 거 있어?

1000625881.english: I'll do that if possible. Vanilla, let's go.

1000625882.english: Oh... Are you sure you just built it?

1000625885.english: Well then, there's nothing I can do. See you next time.
1000625885.korean: 그럼 어쩔 수 없지. 다음에 봐.

1000625886.english: Well then. It's a familiar term.

1000625888.english: Let's go to the room and rest.

1000625900.english: I have a lot of work to do. Give me a moment.

1000625906.english: Let's go for a walk in the nearby forest.

1000625908.english: I was just taking a quick walk.

1000625913.english: Yeah, just for a little while.

1000625917.english: I came out for a short walk.

1000625919.english: What kind of book is it?

1000625925.english: If you keep doing that, I won't be able to concentrate.

1000625927.english: Let's play a game for a bit.

1000625928.english: Yumi is here too. Can I come in?

1000625929.english: I had some free time, so I thought I'd play a game.
1000625929.korean: 잠깐 시간이 나길래 게임이나 할까 해서.

1000625933.english: Gremlin aside... why is Yumi wearing a swimsuit?

1000625935.english: It's cute and I think it suits Yumi well.
1000625935.korean: 귀여워서 유미한테 잘 어울리는 것 같아.

1000625939.english: Fa, Faucre... What the heck is this...

1000625942.english: But... what the heck is that amulet?

1000625944.english: I think I know the gist...

1000625945.english: Let's go. Oh, should I bring you a towel?
1000625945.korean: 일단 가자. 아, 타월이라도 가져다 줄까?

1000625947.english: Now that I think about it, there were some members who asked for awards.

1000625948.english: Are you going out to play? Everyone's in swimsuits.

1000625951.english: No. I was going to rest too. Let's go in.

1000625952.english: ...Well, it would be nice to just relax together.

1000625954.english: No, no, not that. A week?!

1000625957.english: No. I was wrong, but there's nothing I can do about it.
1000625957.korean: 아냐. 내가 잘못 본 건데 어쩔 수 없지.

1000625958.english: ...You didn't do that on purpose, did you?

1000625959.english: Oh, you're a contender for the championship from the start?

1000625961.english: Sleipnir, I'll save you right away...!

1000625963.english: No, not a kiss, but artificial respiration…

1000625973.english: So in the end, those AGS were because of you...
1000625973.korean: 결국 그 AGS들은 너 때문이었다는 거구나...

1000625974.english: Vanilla will take care of it.

1000625977.english: So you used it on Robert's body?

1000625978.english: That's good... but you don't like flesh?

1000625981.english: Because of Snow Feather and Sunny?

1000625984.english: Wait a minute. I have one more question.
1000625984.korean: 잠깐만. 하나 더 묻고 싶은 게 있어.

1000625986.english: Why did you help Snow Feather and Sunny?

1000625992.english: I guess I should do some work while I have time.

1000625994.english: I don't have time, but since Vanilla asked me to do it, I'll try my best.
1000625994.korean: 시간은 없지만, 바닐라가 부탁하는 거니까 어떻게든 해볼게.

1000625995.english: Let's go get some sea breeze.

1000625998.english: I feel a magical power nearby...

1000626002.english: Then is it okay when we are alone at night?
1000626002.korean: 그럼 밤에 둘이 있을 때는 괜찮아?

1000626003.english: Haam... I guess I'll just close my eyes for a bit...
1000626003.korean: 하암... 나는 잠깐 눈 좀 붙일까...

1000626004.english: Let me think about it some more.

1000626007.english: Let's think about it again from the beginning...

1000626009.english: An abandoned laboratory near the fairy village

1000626010.english: The makeshift laboratory where Robert's body was moved

1000626015.english: I thought it would be here.

1000626017.english: You're in a similar position to me.

1000626019.english: I'll ask the doctor to take a look.

1000626020.english: Okay. I'll read it carefully later.

1000626021.english: Aren't you trying to avoid responsibility?

1000626023.english: - While I was carrying out my daily work, I received a report that a communication request had come in from an unidentified line.
1000626023.korean: - 일상적인 업무를 처리하던 도중, 미식별 라인으로 통신 요청이 들어왔다는 보고를 들었다.

1000626024.english: - After confirming that there are no security issues, let's connect the communication...
1000626024.korean: - 보안에 문제가 없다는 것을 확인한 후 통신을 연결하자...

1000626027.english: - The robot that appeared on the screen only made a beeping sound.
1000626027.korean: - 화면에 등장한 로봇은 삐빅거리는 소리만 낼 뿐이었다.

1000626028.english: - To be exact, it resembles a robot from the Saman Industrial Materials Sales Office that has a materials supply contract with us.
1000626028.korean: - 정확히는 우리랑 물자 공급 계약을 맺은 삼안 산업 물자 영업소의 로봇과 닮았다.

1000626029.english: I'm sorry to say that the language module repair has not been completed yet due to a lower priority.
1000626029.korean: 언어 모듈 수복은 우선 순위가 밀려서 아직 복구를 못했다고 미안하다는데요?

1000626031.english: "As expected, there was someone who understood! I thought there would be someone in a group of this size."
1000626031.korean: "역시 알아듣는 분이 있었군요! 이정도 규모의 집단이라면 있을거라고 생각했어요." 래요.

1000626034.english: Ah, wait a moment. I'll listen to everything and tell you all at once.
1000626034.korean: 아, 잠시만요. 다 듣고 한 번에 말씀 드릴게요.

1000626035.english: The unidentified robot spoke with a highly agitated expression... should I say...
1000626035.korean: - 정체를 알 수 없는 로봇은 잔뜩 흥분한 기색으로 말... 이라고 해야 하나...

1000626036.english: Anyway, the conversation continued, and Gremlin kept nodding and interjecting, "Oh my...", "I see!"
1000626036.korean: - 어쨌든 대화를 이어갔고, 그렘린은 연신 고개를 끄덕이며 "어머...", "그랬구나!" 하는 추임새를 넣었다.

1000626038.english: OK! I've figured it all out.

1000626039.english: Hmm... thanks to my love for machines?

1000626040.english: First off, this guy used to manage the combat simulation facility built by Saman Industries.
1000626040.korean: 일단 얘는 예전에 삼안 산업에서 만든 전투 시뮬레이션 시설을 관리하던 애래요.

1000626041.english: They said that it had ceased functioning due to the aftermath of the war but successfully restarted this time, and requested communication to ask for help because there is a problem.
1000626041.korean: 전쟁의 여파로 기능이 정지됐다가 이번에 재기동에 성공했는데, 문제가 있어서 도움을 청하려고 통신을 요청했대요.

1000626043.english: Don't worry. I'll explain everything to you.
1000626043.korean: 걱정 마. 내가 다 잘 말해드릴게.

1000626044.english: "Please, I beg of you! I really need your help!" they say.
1000626044.korean: "제발 부탁드려요! 여러분의 도움이 꼭 필요합니다!" 래요.

1000626045.english: As I marveled, the gremlin grinned and continued speaking.
1000626045.korean: - 내가 감탄하자 그렘린은 씨익 웃고는 말을 이어갔다.

1000626046.english: They barely managed to restore the virtual simulation server, but they said it was impossible to save the original facilities.
1000626046.korean: 가상 시뮬레이션 서버는 겨우 복구했는데, 원래 사용하던 시설은 도저히 살릴 수가 없었대요.

1000626047.english: However, since the server is going completely down and then back on, we need to input the startup key simultaneously at the control tower right now and where the actual simulation will take place...
1000626047.korean: 그런데 서버가 완전히 내려갔다 켜지는 거라서, 지금 있는 컨트롤 타워랑 실제 시뮬레이션이 진행될 곳에서 동시에 기동 키를 입력해야하는데...

1000626048.english: I thought of the Orca virtual training room I usually use.
1000626048.korean: - 평소에 사용하는 오르카의 가상 훈련실을 떠올렸다.

1000626049.english: Yes. So, the main point was that they would provide the simulation server, code, and resources, and asked for help with server recovery as well as conducting simulations to collect combat data.
1000626049.korean: 네. 그래서 시뮬레이션 서버와 코드, 리소스를 제공할테니 서버 복구와 더불어 시뮬레이션을 진행해서 전투 데이터 모으는 걸 도와달라는게 주 내용이었어요.

1000626053.english: In that case, along with your reward, I will provide you with the supplies and equipment prepared to help you proceed with the simulation more smoothly!
1000626053.korean: "그럼 보답과 더불어 시뮬레이션을 더욱 원활히 진행하실 수 있도록 준비되어있는 물자와 장비를 제공해드릴게요!"

1000626055.english: Okay, okay. I was going to tell you that too.

1000626056.english: They said that if we restore the server, run the simulation, and send the combat data, they will provide supplies and equipment in return.
1000626056.korean: 서버를 복구하고 시뮬레이션을 진행해 전투 데이터를 보내주면 그 보답으로 물자와 장비를 지원해주겠대요.

1000626057.english: Even though the facility was destroyed, it seems some supplies prepared for the simulation remained.
1000626057.korean: 시설은 부서졌어도, 시뮬레이션을 위해 준비해뒀던 물자는 좀 남은 모양이에요.

1000626058.english: The virtual training room we currently have is quite advanced, but the more diverse the training scenarios, the better.
1000626058.korean: - 지금 우리가 보유한 가상 훈련실은 상당한 수준이지만, 역시 훈련 상황은 다양할 수록 좋겠지.

1000626059.english: Since the troops' training must proceed anyway, there is no downside if supplies and equipment are provided as well.
1000626059.korean: - 어차피 대원들의 훈련은 진행하야 하는데, 거기다 물자와 장비까지 얹어준다면 손해볼 일은 없다.

1000626066.english: Commander, you have finally awakened to a love for machines, too!
1000626066.korean: 사령관님도 드디어 기계에 대한 사랑을 깨우치셨군요!

1000626068.english: We installed the received training program at our training facility under the leadership of Gremlin and connected the server.
1000626068.korean: - 전달받은 훈련 프로그램을 그렘린의 주도하에 우리 훈련 시설에 설치하고 서버를 연결했다.

1000626069.english: Afterwards, when the server startup key was entered simultaneously, the training program started without any problems.
1000626069.korean: - 이후 동시에 서버 기동 키를 입력하자, 문제 없이 훈련 프로그램이 기동했다.

1000626071.english: It seemed like I could understand what the robot was saying this time, as it kept nodding off while making a beeping sound as if it were extremely excited.
1000626071.korean: - 몹시 흥분한 듯한 삐빗 소리를 내며 연신 꾸벅거리는 로봇의 말은 이번엔 나도 알아들을 수 있을 것 같았다.

1000626072.english: Hehe. And they said they look forward to working with me in the future as well.

1000626073.english: I reviewed the various training scenarios displayed in conjunction with the panel and decided to schedule which members to train.
1000626073.korean: - 패널과 연동되어 출력되는 여러가지 훈련 상황들을 훑어보며, 어떤 대원들을 훈련시킬지 스케쥴을 짜기로 했다.

1000626076.english: But I think I've seen that robot somewhere...
1000626076.korean: 그런데 저 로봇 어디서 본 것 같은데...

1000626083.english: That's what you're asking us to help you with.

1000626086.english: Okay, I'll allow it. Gremlin, you can handle this.

1000626087.english: Make sure to thoroughly check for viruses or hacking attempts.
1000626087.korean: 바이러스나 해킹 시도는 없는지 확인 철저하게 하고.

1000626090.english: Okay. Then let's give it a try.
1000626090.korean: 그래. 그럼 시험삼아 한 번 구동해볼까.

1000626091.english: Could you please speak to me in a way I can understand?
1000626091.korean: 내가 알아들을 수 있는 말로 소통해줄래?

1000626096.english: Ah... Isn't this something you treasure, Master? Can I accept something like this? I can't, can I? Yes? ... You say it's okay? Ah... For the first time since I started working, the fields of my heart have been abundant!
1000626096.korean: 앗… 이건 주인님이 아끼시던 물건 아닌가요? 이런 걸 제가 받아도 될까요? 역시 안 되겠죠? 네? …된다고요? 아아... 제가 가동을 시작한 이후 처음으로 제 마음의 밭에 풍년이 들었어요!

1000626097.english: Commander, I've received your item. Don't worry about losing it. The data server backs it up daily... Huh? Are you giving it to me? Uh, uh, uh... This item won't be stored in the public area. Is that okay? Where will it be stored... I'll let you, Commander, know later!
1000626097.korean: 사령관님의 물건, 정상적으로 접수했습니다. 분실 걱정은 하지 마세요. 데이터 서버에 매일 백업이... 네? 저한테 주는 건가요? 어, 저기, 그… 이 물건은 공용 공간에 보관되지 않을 텐데 괜찮은가요? 어디에 보관할 거냐면... 나중에 사, 사령관님한테만 알려드릴게요!

1000626098.english: Half… Ji? Hey, Commander? You know what it means to give me this, don't you? Well, fine. I don't mind being a Commander-type. But if you ever show yourself timid in front of me, brace yourself. My kicks might make your day a little more miserable.
1000626098.korean: 반… 지? 이봐, 사령관님? 이걸 나한테 주는 게 어떤 의미인지는 알고 있는 거겠지? 뭐 좋아, 일단 나도 사령관 같은 스타일이 싫진 않으니까. 하지만, 혹시라도 내 앞에서 소심한 모습을 보일 거라면 단단히 각오해 둬. 내 발길질로 당신의 하루하루가 조금 괴로워질 수도 있거든.

1000626099.english: Kaen, I learned from the lord. The lord's thoughts, tastes, habits... I know everything. This too... I know. Yes. Love. The lord loves Kaen, Kaen loves the lord.&nI'll tell you my name. If you love someone, it's a rule to tell them your name. Kaen's name is Hatsuna. It means rapeseed flower. Lord. Call me Hatsuna. ...Yeah. I'm glad.&n
1000626099.korean: 카엔, 주공한테  배웠어. 주공의 생각, 취향, 습관… 전부, 알아. 이것도… 알아. 응. 사랑. 주공이 카엔을, 카엔이 주공을, 사랑해. &n이름, 알려줄게. 사랑하면, 이름 알려주는 게 규칙. 카엔의 이름, 하츠나. 유채꽃이라는 뜻. 주공. 하츠나, 불러줘. ...응. 기뻐.

1000626100.english: This, this is… That, that's right. It's almost training time. Commander, then a little later, uh… Ah, I know. But I still don't know how to react… Commander. As you well know by now, I am full of flaws. So that even I, who am like that, can learn about affection… Will you, help me…?&n
1000626100.korean: 이, 이건… 그, 그렇지. 이제 곧 훈련 시간이다. 사령관, 그럼 조금 이따, 으으… 아, 알고 있다. 그래도 어떻게 반응해야 할 지 모르겠어서… 사령관. 이제 잘 알겠지만, 나는 결점 투성이다. 그런 내가 애정이라는 것도 알아갈 수 있도록… 함께, 해주겠나…?

1000626101.english: I didn't realize you were such a proactive person, Commander... I didn't realize that either. ... But Commander? Why did you take interest in a meticulous, old-fashioned soldier like me? May I ask? ... Is that so? Understood... I will continue to do my best to meet your expectations, Commander.
1000626101.korean: 사령관님이 이렇게 적극적인 분이셨을 줄은… 저도 미처 몰랐습니다. ... 그런데 사령관님? 어째서 저처럼 깐깐하고, 고지식한 군인에게 관심을 가지셨는지. 여쭤봐도 될까요? ... 그런가요? 알겠습니다… 앞으로도 사령관님의 기대에 부응하도록 최선을 다하겠어요.

1000626102.english: The task of securing supplies for the island has been successfully completed. However, it seems it will take more time to build facilities suitable for staying on the island.
1000626102.korean: 섬의 물자를 확보하는 일은 무사히 완료되었소이다. 다만 섬에 머물 정도의 시설을 만드는 데에는 시간이 더 걸릴 것 같소.

1000626103.english: - I was receiving regular reports from the Invincible Dragon. Since joining, the dragon has been building the island's infrastructure for the future.
1000626103.korean: - 나는 무적의 용에게서 정기보고를 듣고 있었다. 용은 합류 이후 계속 미래를 위한 섬의 인프라를 구축하고 있었다.

1000626104.english: For the future of the Orca, this is nothing. But... I hope this is over quickly so I can rejoin you.
1000626104.korean: 오르카 호의 미래를 위해서라면 이 정도의 일은 아무것도 아니오. 다만… 빨리 이 일이 끝나 다시 그쪽으로 합류했으면 좋겠군.

1000626105.english: - After leading the navy in the war of destruction and going into hibernation, the dragon has been working hard for us ever since he woke up recently.
1000626105.korean: - 멸망 전쟁에서 해군을 이끌다 동면에 들고, 얼마전 깨어난 이후에도 용은 계속해서 우리를 위해 힘써주고 있다.

1000626106.english: ...Mary Gong said that if you do something good on the Orca, you will be rewarded accordingly.
1000626106.korean: ...마리 공이 말하길, 오르카 호에선 공적을 세우면 그대가 그에 걸맞는 보상을 해준다고 하더군.

1000626107.english: Ahem... I, I'm not asking for money or anything like that. However...
1000626107.korean: 흠흠... 소, 소관은 금품 따위를 바라는 것이 아니오. 다만…

1000626108.english: It may be presumptuous, but Sowan was also born a woman. According to Princess Marie…
1000626108.korean: 주제넘은 말이지만, 소관도 여자로 태어난 몸. 그… 마리 공에 의하면….

1000626109.english: - As the dragon was hesitating and about to speak, Charlotte and Brownie came rushing in, leading Tomo.
1000626109.korean: - 용이 머뭇거리며 말을 꺼내려던 때, 샬럿과 브라우니가 토모를 이끌고 쳐들어왔다.

1000626110.english: Your Majesty, Your Majesty! This is a serious matter, Your Majesty!

1000626111.english: This is really serious! Tomo is acting strange!

1000626112.english: I'm fine! Let go of this!

1000626114.english: Anyway, things are going smoothly here, so don't worry.
1000626114.korean: 어찌 됐든 이쪽의 일은 순조롭게 진행 중이니 걱정하지 않아도 되오.

1000626115.english: ...and we'll talk about compensation next time.

1000626116.english: Well then, I wish you good luck.

1000626117.english: - I saw Charlotte and Brownie still fidgeting after the communication screen went off.
1000626117.korean: - 통신 화면이 꺼진 뒤 아직도 안절부절하고 있는 샬럿과 브라우니를 보았다.

1000626119.english: I'm completely fine. I'm so energetic.

1000626121.english: Oh, no... that's right. That's why...
1000626121.korean: 아, 아니... 그런게 맞지 말입니다. 그러니까 그게...

1000626126.english: That was a little while ago, the three of us, Draco, and War Wolf were playing Steel Line Online.
1000626126.korean: 그게 조금 전, 저희 셋이랑 드라코, 워울프 다섯 명이서 스틸라인 온라인을 하고 있었지 말입니다.

1000626127.english: - Steel Line Online. Yumi and Gremlin recently restored the game to its pre-apocalyptic state, and are now responsible for the members' free time.
1000626127.korean: - 스틸라인 온라인. 얼마 전 유미와 그렘린이 멸망 전의 게임을 복원하면서 지금은 대원들의 여가시간을 책임지고 있다.

1000626128.english: But then War Wolf made a mistake and started arguing with Tomo... and they were arguing about who knew the game better...
1000626128.korean: 그런데 워울프가 실수를 하는 바람에 토모랑 말다툼이 시작되서... 누가 더 게임을 잘 아는지 아웅다웅 하다가...

1000626129.english: In the end, Lord Lugaru was disappointed when Tomo-san called him 'a guy who doesn't even know how to play games'.
1000626129.korean: 결국 루가루 공이 토모 양에게 '게임을 알지도 못하는 녀석' 이라는 소리를 듣고 실의에 빠졌어요.

1000626130.english: War Wolf is mumbling while looking at the wall behind him... and Draco is trying hard to comfort him...
1000626130.korean: 워울프는 그 뒤로 벽을 보면서 중얼거리고 있고... 드라코가 열심히 달래주고 있슴다...

1000626131.english: Perhaps Lord Lugaru was more shocked by the fact that he lost to Miss Tomo in a knowledge contest than by the words, "He doesn't even know how to play games."
1000626131.korean: 아마 루가루 공은 '게임을 알지도 못하는 녀석' 이란 말 보다는 토모 양에게 지식대결에서 졌다는 사실에 충격에 빠졌을 거예요.

1000626132.english: Listen, listen, don't you guys treat me too well?
1000626132.korean: 듣자듣자 하니 너희들 내 취급 너무 하지 않아?

1000626133.english: I'm a Bioroid created to be a model student. It's only natural for me to be smart!
1000626133.korean: 난 이래봬도 모범생 역할로 제작된 바이오로이드야. 똑똑한 게 당연하다고!

1000626134.english: To be called a model student... I wonder if I only know a little about games...
1000626134.korean: 모범생이라기엔... 너무 게임쪽만 잘 아는게 아닌지...

1000626135.english: Oh, and you're studying well too!

1000626136.english: - Tomo was currently receiving love education from Alexandra along with LRL, Coco, Emily, and other members.
1000626136.korean: - 토모는 지금 LRL, 코코, 에밀리 등의 대원들과 함께 알렉산드라에게 사랑의 교육을받고 있었다.

1000626137.english: - For your information, according to Alexandra's report, Tomo's progress is hopeless.
1000626137.korean: - 참고로, 알렉산드라의 보고에 의하면 토모의 진도는 절망적이다.

1000626138.english: Your Majesty, is it possible that Miss Tomo is seriously ill...?
1000626138.korean: 폐하, 혹시 토모 양이 큰 병에 걸린 게 아닐까요...?

1000626139.english: They say people do things they've never done before before they die. Maybe Tomodo...
1000626139.korean: 사람은 죽기 전에 안하던 행동을 한다지 말입니다. 혹시 토모도...

1000626141.english: Um... So, the T-2 Brownie has 680 health, 56 ATK, is a Trooper class, and its default weapon is the F2090 Assault Rifle. Its ATK growth is...
1000626141.korean: 음… 그러니까 T-2 브라우니의 체력이 680 공격력이 56이고 클래스는 Trooper에 기본 무장은 F2090 Assault Rifle. 성장공격력은…

1000626142.english: Look at this. Don't let information about me, even information I don't know, flow out like this!
1000626142.korean: 이것 좀 보시지 말입니다. 저도 모르는 제 정보가 이렇게 술술 나오지 말입니다!

1000626143.english: What? You'll memorize this much after playing a few games.
1000626143.korean: 뭐? 이 정도는 게임 몇 판 하면 저절로 외워지는 거잖아.

1000626144.english: Lord Lugaru was also disappointed to hear these words from Miss Tomo...
1000626144.korean: 루가루 공도 토모 양에게 이런 소리를 듣고 실의에 빠졌죠...

1000626145.english: Commander. Aren't you ignoring me too much?
1000626145.korean: 사령관. 날 너무 무시하는 거 아냐?

1000626146.english: The mouse is called M.O.U.H.T. because it resembles the shape of a human mouth, right?
1000626146.korean: 마우스는 사람의 입 모양과 닮았다고 해서 M.O.U.H.T 마.우.스 라고 부르는 거잖아?

1000626150.english: - ...It seems like this is already out of my hands.
1000626150.korean: - ...이건 이미 내 손을 떠난 것 같군.

1000626153.english: - As we opened the door with Tomo grumbling, a haggard-looking doctor greeted us.
1000626153.korean: - 투덜대는 토모와 함께 문을 열자, 초췌한 모습의 닥터가 우리를 맞이해주었다.

1000626154.english: It's nothing... It's just that I'm on fire after a long time- haam...
1000626154.korean: 별 일 아냐... 그냥 간만에 불타올라- 하암...

1000626155.english: After Cerestia came, flowers and bushes kept growing in the hallway.
1000626155.korean: 세레스티아 언니가 온 뒤에 자꾸 복도에 꽃이랑 덤불들이 자라더라구.

1000626156.english: It may look good, but it can cause problems, so use herbicide- haaam...
1000626156.korean: 보기는 좋아도 문제가 생길 수 있으니까 제초제를- 하아암...

1000626157.english: ...I was making herbicide. Since it wasn't a normal plant, it didn't die easily.
1000626157.korean: ...제초제를 만들고 있었어. 보통 식물이 아니라서 그런지 잘 죽지도 않더라구.

1000626158.english: But what's wrong? Tomo-nee, where does it hurt?
1000626158.korean: 그런데 웬일이야? 토모 언니, 어디 아파?

1000626159.english: - When I explained what had happened a little while ago, the doctor's face hardened.
1000626159.korean: - 조금 전 있었던 일을 설명해주자 닥터의 얼굴이 딱딱하게 굳었다.

1000626160.english: Oh, that's ridiculous... This is a phenomenon that can't be explained by science and technology...
1000626160.korean: 마, 말도 안돼... 과학 기술로 설명할 수 없는 현상이야...

1000626161.english: Even the doctor would do that?! I'm normal!

1000626164.english: Brother, you might not know this, but Tomo once received a lot of attention from the world as a genius.
1000626164.korean: 오빠는 잘 모르겠지만, 예전 토모 언니는 한번 천재로 세상에 큰 주목을 받은 적이 있었어.

1000626165.english: I'm telling you, there were even fights between companies because of that.
1000626165.korean: 그것 때문에 회사들끼리 다툰 일도 있었다니까?

1000626167.english: See, Commander! I told you so, right? I'm a genius who was even recognized by companies!
1000626167.korean: 봐봐, 사령관! 내 말이 맞지? 나는 회사들에게도 인정받았던 천재라니까?

1000626168.english: In the Tomo model, individuals with genius traits would occasionally appear as mutations.
1000626168.korean: 토모 모델한테선 가끔 돌연변이로 천재적인 면모를 지닌 개체가 나타나곤 했거든.

1000626171.english: There was a bioroid called 'Joyful Tomo' that once garnered the world's attention, you know?
1000626171.korean: 예전에 '즐거운 토모' 라고 불리던 바이오로이드가 세상의 주목을 받은 적이 있었거든?

1000626172.english: Yeah. Do you know that there used to be a law that made the human rights of bioroids the same as those of inanimate objects?
1000626172.korean: 응. 예전에 바이오로이드들의 인권을 무생물과 동일하게 만들었던 법이 있었던 거, 알아?

1000626173.english: At that time, a reporter named 'Sherlock Kimura' and his assistant 'Joyful Tomo' uncovered criminal activities hidden behind the law and exposed them to the world.
1000626173.korean: 그때 '셜록 키무라' 라는 기자랑 조수인 '즐거운 토모' 가 법 뒤에 있던 범죄 행위들을 파헤치면서 세상에 알렸어.

1000626174.english: Oh, I know that. It was the 'Kirishima Scandal', right?

1000626175.english: Yeah, because of that incident, 'Joyful Tomo' gained the world's attention, and Fax Company stole that model and created a model called 'Leanne'.
1000626175.korean: 응, 그 사건으로 '즐거운 토모' 는 세상의 주목을 받게 되었고, 그 모델을 팩스 사에서 도용해서 '리앤' 이라고 불리는 모델을 만들었었어.

1000626176.english: I don't know the details either, but I heard she worked at unmanned police stations all over the world under the name 'Merciful Leanne'.
1000626176.korean: 나도 자세하게는 모르지만, '자비로운 리앤' 이라고 불리면서 세계 곳곳의 무인 경찰서에서 일했다고 해.

1000626177.english: I hate to admit it, but I heard that he is smart enough to be compared to me.
1000626177.korean: 인정하긴 싫지만, 나랑 비교될만큼 똑똑하다고 들었어.

1000626178.english: I remember seeing it briefly in the Orca archives.
1000626178.korean: - 오르카 호 기록실에서 잠깐 스치듯 본 기억이 난다.

1000626179.english: A model smart enough to be compared to a doctor... it will definitely be helpful to us.
1000626179.korean: - 닥터와 비견될만큼 똑똑한 모델이라... 분명 우리에게 도움이 되겠군.

1000626180.english: don't know the details either. Also, after the War of Annihilation broke out, all contact was lost with the Leanne models... and since there is no genetic map, restoration is difficult...
1000626180.korean: 나도 더 자세히는 몰라. 또 멸망 전쟁이 일어난 뒤에 모든 리앤 모델들과 소식이 끊겨 버렸고... 유전자 지도도 없으니 복원도 힘들고...

1000626181.english: Ah, right! There's a City Guard branch in the nearby waters. Maybe there's a clue there?
1000626181.korean: 아, 그래! 근처 해역에 시티가드 지부가 있어. 거기라면 단서가 있지 않을까?

1000626183.english: Oppa. I mean, you were good enough to be compared to me, not that you're smarter than me, okay?
1000626183.korean: 오빠. 그래도 나랑 비교될 정도였다는 거지, 나보다 똑똑한 건 아니라구?

1000626184.english: Ruffling the pouting Doctor's hair, I headed to the bridge to organize the unit.
1000626184.korean: - 입을 삐죽이는 닥터의 머리를 헝클이며 부대 편성을 위해 함교로 향했다.

1000626186.korean: 그, 그래서 나는 문제 없는거지? 맞지?

1000626189.english: That was great. It was a perfect success.

1000626192.english: You're the AL Rays Yang who just joined, right?
1000626192.korean: 이번에 합류한 AL 레이스 양, 맞죠?

1000626195.english: Hehe, nice to meet you. My name is Shirayuri.

1000626196.english: I don't see any Doombringers today. Are you on a solo operation?

1000626198.english: feel the same way. Given my affiliation, it’s a bit awkward with the City Guards, isn’t it? That’s why I suggested to the Commander that I could come out alone.
1000626198.korean: 저도 그래요. 아무래도 제 소속상, 시티가드 분들이랑은 조금 불편하잖아요? 그래서 사령관님한테 혼자 나오고 싶다고 건의드렸죠.

1000626199.english: Well... I was a little personal interested, too.

1000626201.english: It's nothing special. We are both used to solo operations, but the search area is quite wide, isn't it?
1000626201.korean: 별 건 아니에요. 저희 둘 다 단독작전에 익숙하긴 하지만, 수색해야할 범위가 꽤 넓잖아요?

1000626202.english: I only want to avoid the City Guards, so I was wondering if we could search together with Miss Lace.
1000626202.korean: 저는 시티가드 분들만 피하고 싶으니까, 레이스 양이랑 같이 수색하면 어떨까 해서요.

1000626204.english: Hmm... but no matter how much I look around, it's just an ordinary building. Naturally, there's no electricity.
1000626204.korean: 음... 그런데 아무리 둘러봐도 그냥 평범한 건물이에요. 당연히 전기도 안들어오고.

1000626206.english: Oh my, the solar power equipment is still there? If we fix this up, we might be able to restore the power.
1000626206.korean: 어머, 태양광 설비가 남아있네요? 이걸 손보면 전력은 복구할 수도 있겠어요.

1000626208.english: Still, I haven't found any clues yet, so I wonder how long it will take...
1000626208.korean: 그래도 아직까지 아무런 단서도 못 찾았는데, 얼마나 걸릴지...

1000626209.english: Hey... there was a pattern on that wall over there?
1000626209.korean: 저기… 저 쪽 벽에 문양이 있던데?

1000626213.english: Haa... I was surprised. So it was Miss Phantom?

1000626214.english: I, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to surprise you...

1000626215.english: Here, the gun. It's a relief it didn't fire when I dropped it.
1000626215.korean: 여기, 총. 떨어뜨릴 때 격발이 안돼서 다행이다.

1000626218.english: That is certainly amazing. I didn't notice at all.
1000626218.korean: 확실히 대단하긴 하네요. 전혀 눈치 못 챘어요.

1000626219.english: Since when have you been following me?

1000626220.english: Seeing Race enter the operation area alone... I was worried, so I kept...
1000626220.korean: 레이스가 작전 지역에 혼자 들어오는 걸 보고... 걱정되서 계속...

1000626221.english: W-have you been following me from the very beginning?!

1000626222.english: Then, by any chance... even in the battle earlier...

1000626223.english: Ah, yeah. It seemed like Lace hadn't seen it, so I took care of a few of them.
1000626223.korean: 아, 응. 레이스가 미처 못 본 것 같길래 몇몇은 내가 처리했어.

1000626226.english: I thought I had handled it perfectly all by myself...

1000626227.english: Uh, uh...? Why are you sitting down?

1000626228.english: By the way, what is the pattern you mentioned a moment ago?
1000626228.korean: 그런데 조금 전에 말씀하신 문양은 뭔가요?

1000626229.english: Ah, there was "UOU" written behind the flowerpot over there. I think that was the secret symbol of Agency 080...
1000626229.korean: 아, 저기 화분 뒤에 UOU라고 적혀있었어. 그거, 080기관의 비밀표식이었던 것 같아서...

1000626230.english: What? You mean there was a mark like that?

1000626231.english: No, before that. How did you know that is our organization's symbol?
1000626231.korean: 아니, 그전에. 그게 저희 기관의 표식인 건 어떻게 아신거죠?

1000626232.english: The thing is... I happened to overhear you and the Doctor talking last week...
1000626232.korean: 그게... 지난주에 우연히 닥터랑 네가 이야기하는 걸 들어서...

1000626233.english: I-I didn't mean to. I'm sorry...

1000626234.english: Hehe, no. Now that the organization and everything else is gone, what use would a secret be?
1000626234.korean: 후훗, 아니에요. 기관이고 뭐고 다 없어진 마당에 비밀이 무슨 소용이겠어요?

1000626235.english: It wasn't even a highly classified secret to begin with... Shall we take a look?
1000626235.korean: 애초에 그렇게 보안 수준이 높은 기밀도 아니었고... 한 번 볼까요?

1000626236.english: That's true. This is just a sign that 'there is something here.'
1000626236.korean: 정말이네요. 이건 '이곳에 무언가가 있다' 정도의 표식이에요.

1000626237.english: It looks like there is some kind of device hidden behind this wall.
1000626237.korean: 이 벽 뒤에 숨겨진 장치 같은 게 있는 모양이네요.

1000626238.english: There is a space behind the wall...!

1000626239.english: Heh, I should have found this...

1000626240.english: This is... the server room. It looks like all the power was being used to maintain this.
1000626240.korean: 여긴... 서버실이군요. 전력이 전부 이걸 유지하는데 쓰이고 있었던 것 같아요.

1000626241.english: If it is being kept in a secret location, and at a City Guard branch no less, it must be a considerably important record.
1000626241.korean: 비밀장소에, 그것도 시티가드 지부에 보관할 정도라면 상당히 중요한 기록인가본데요?

1000626245.english: It's stopped functioning. I destroyed the core just in case, though...
1000626245.korean: 기능이 정지되어 있어. 혹시 몰라서 코어를 파괴하긴 했지만...

1000626248.english: It's completely discharged. To think they even drew power to charge the security AGSs...
1000626248.korean: 방전되어있네요. 경비 AGS들을 충전할 전력까지 끌어오다니...

1000626249.english: This is getting more and more interesting.

1000626252.english: Le, Lace... It's dusty there, so you shouldn't sit there...
1000626252.korean: 레, 레이스... 거기 먼지 많으니까 앉으면 안 돼...

1000626253.english: This is... a VR recording. It's a format that was popular a while ago. On top of that...
1000626253.korean: 이건... VR 기록물이네요. 예전에 유행했던 형식이에요. 거기다...

1000626254.english: "< Seek, and you will find > ...That is a meaningful message."

1000626256.english: Yes. I suppose this was the intention of the person who placed the secret mark. Only this one has less dust accumulated.
1000626256.korean: 네. 이게 비밀 표식을 한 사람의 의도인가보군요. 이것만 먼지가 덜 쌓여있어요.

1000626257.english: I'll go back to Orca and show it to the Commander.

1000626258.english: Through Shirayuri's report, we discovered a server room hidden behind the City Guard building.
1000626258.korean: - 시라유리의 보고를 통해 우리는 시티가드 건물 뒤에 숨겨진 서버실을 발견하게 되었다.

1000626259.english: You've arrived, Commander. I checked what was inside while hacking the server room with Dr. Yang.
1000626259.korean: 오셨군요, 사령관님. 닥터 양과 서버실을 해킹하면서 어떤 내용이 들어있는지 확인했어요.

1000626260.english: However, the contents cannot be examined using ordinary methods.
1000626260.korean: 하지만 평범한 방법으론 내용을 살펴볼 수 없게 되어있어요.

1000626261.english: Yes. It seems to consist of virtual reality records, just like last time.
1000626261.korean: 네. 저번처럼 가상 현실 기록물로 이루어진 것 같아요.

1000626262.english: However, the unique thing is... the entire server room exists for a single virtual reality. The content is quite large for a typical virtual reality record.
1000626262.korean: 그런데 특이한 점은... 서버실 전체가 하나의 가상 현실을 위해 존재하고 있어요. 일반적인 가상 현실 기록물이라기엔 내용물이 꽤 크죠.

1000626263.english: So, Skadi and I did some more research, you know?
1000626263.korean: 그래서 스카디 언니랑 내가 좀 더 조사해봤거든?

1000626264.english: As a result, I concluded that this wasn't created as virtual reality from the start.
1000626264.korean: 그 결과, 이건 처음부터 가상 현실로 만들어진 게 아니라는 결론을 내렸어.

1000626265.english: There was probably some other purpose.
1000626265.korean: 아마 뭔가 다른 목적이 있었을 거야.

1000626266.english: Also, everything else is encrypted so it can't be checked from the outside... but there is just one thing. I checked the code that outputs internal data when you clear the game. It's a kind of clear reward.
1000626266.korean: 또, 다른 건 전부 암호화 되어있어서 밖에서는 확인할 수 없는데... 딱 한가지. 게임을 클리어하면 내부 데이터를 출력하는 코드를 확인했어. 일종의 클리어 보상인거지.

1000626267.english: Well... it might be related to losing contact with the Leanne models... but ultimately, I think the only way to find out is to play this.
1000626267.korean: 글쎄... 리앤 모델들과 연락이 두절된 것과 관계가 있을 수도 있겠지만... 결국 알아보려면 이걸 플레이해보는 수밖에 없을 것 같아.

1000626268.english: Saying that, the doctor pointed to the chair that had been prepared before anyone realized it.
1000626268.korean: - 닥터는 그렇게 말하며 어느새 마련된 의자를 가리켰다.

1000626269.english: Unfortunately, it turns out you can only access virtual reality through human brainwaves.
1000626269.korean: 안타깝게도 인간의 뇌파를 통해서만 가상 현실에 접속할 수 있더라구~

1000626270.english: I even tried to move the equipment to Orca or connect the servers, but that was impossible...
1000626270.korean: 하다못해 오르카로 설비를 옮기거나 서버를 연결하려 했는데 그것도 무리였어...

1000626271.english: Sigh, I wanted to do it... but you already have experience, right?
1000626271.korean: 에휴, 내가 하고 싶었는데... 그래도 오빠는 이미 경험 있지?

1000626272.english: As we did last time, using dummies, the security is surprisingly strong.
1000626272.korean: 저번처럼 더미를 이용해 저희가 하기에는 예상외로 보안이 단단해요.

1000626273.english: We can help you indirectly, Commander, but... the gameplay itself is yours to handle...
1000626273.korean: 저희가 간접적으로 사령관님을 도울 수는 있겠지만... 게임플레이 자체는 사령관님이 직접...

1000626274.english: I'm sorry, Big Brother. But I've confirmed several times that it doesn't harm you.
1000626274.korean: 미안해, 오빠. 그래도 오빠한테 해가 가지 않는다는 건 몇 번씩 확인했어.

1000626276.english: - I don't have any good memories of virtual reality, but it's different when it comes to games.
1000626276.korean: - 가상현실에는 별로 좋은 기억이 없지만, 게임이라면 또 다르다.

1000626281.english: - Just as we were about to start, a meeting was called to set up a defense line around the server room, which dampened the excitement a bit.
1000626281.korean: - 시작하려는 찰나, 서버실 주변의 방어진 구축을 위해 회의가 소집되는 바람에 조금 김이 빠졌다.

1000626282.english: Yeah. And you know, Big Brother, right? Even in a virtual reality, dying can cause significant damage to your physical body, so you have to be careful.
1000626282.korean: 응. 그리고 오빠도 알지? 아무리 가상현실이라도 죽게 되면 실제 몸에 큰 충격이 올 수도 있으니까 조심해야 해.

1000626283.english: We'll continue to monitor you. And once the equipment is ready, we'll move you to a comfortable bed. Don't be surprised if you wake up later.
1000626283.korean: 우리가 계속 모니터링하고 있을게. 그리고 설비가 준비되면 편안한 침대로 옮겨줄거니까 나중에 깨어나서 놀라지 말구~

1000626285.english: - My head spun and my vision went dark as the doctor spoke.
1000626285.korean: - 닥터의 말과 함께 머리가 핑 돌며 눈 앞이 깜깜해졌다.

1000626286.english: - While I was feeling dizzy and feeling my way around, I heard a deep voice from in front of me.
1000626286.korean: - 현기증을 참으며 이곳저곳을 더듬는 도중 앞에서 굵은 목소리가 들렸다.

1000626287.english: Watson! Hey, Watson! Are you listening?

1000626289.english: - The dizziness soon subsided and my vision cleared. A man and a woman stood before me, staring at me.
1000626289.korean: - 곧 현기증이 가시고 눈 앞이 밝아졌다. 내 앞에선 한 쌍의 남녀가 나를 바라보고 있다.

1000626293.english: "Are you calling me?" I repeated the name and looked at the man in front of me.
1000626293.korean: - 나를 부르는 건가? 이름을 되뇌며 눈 앞의 남자를 보았다.

1000626294.english: - This is the first time I've seen a living human male besides me. No, maybe he's alive...?
1000626294.korean: - 나를 제외한 살아있는 인간 남성을 보는 건 처음이군. 아니, 살아있는 건 아닌가...?

1000626295.english: I sat up slightly on the leather sofa to assess the situation. The papers strewn across the desk and onto the floor were splattered under my feet.
1000626295.korean: - 상황을 파악하기 위해 가죽 소파에서 살짝 몸을 일으켰다. 책상도 모자라 바닥에까지 널브러진 서류들이 구둣발에 밟혔다.

1000626296.english: Hahaha. Watson, why are you suddenly looking so stupid?
1000626296.korean: 꺄하핫. 왓슨, 갑자기 왜 그렇게 바보 같은 얼굴이야?

1000626298.english: Why are you doing that in the middle of a conversation? Did you see a ghost?
1000626298.korean: 한창 이야기 중에 왜그러지? 귀신이라도 본 건가?

1000626300.english: - I didn't notice it right away because her impression was a little different, but the woman with the cheerful smile definitely resembled Tomo.
1000626300.korean: - 인상이 조금 달라 바로 알아채지 못했지만, 쾌활하게 웃는 여자는 분명 토모를 닮았다.

1000626301.english: - And if the name is Kimura...

1000626302.english: ...This is driving me crazy. Are you becoming like Tomo too?

1000626303.english: Unless you have amnesia for 5 seconds, then give me your opinion.
1000626303.korean: 5초만에 기억 상실증이라도 걸린 게 아니라면 어서 의견을 내 봐.

1000626304.english: What do you think about the hypothesis that the victim was a member of the 'Kasahane-gumi'?
1000626304.korean: 피해자가 '카사하네구미'의 일원이라는 가설, 자네는 어떻게 생각하지?

1000626305.english: What? Do you not understand at all?
1000626305.korean: 뭐지? 혹시 전혀 이해를 못 한 건가?

1000626306.english: Ahahahaha! Watson, are you perhaps dumber than Tomo?
1000626306.korean: 아하하하하! 혹시 왓슨, 토모보다 머리 나쁜 거 아냐?

1000626307.english: I knew it. You were thinking of something else again.
1000626307.korean: 그럴 줄 알았지. 또 딴 생각을 하고 있었군.

1000626308.english: I'll say it again, so listen carefully this time.
1000626308.korean: 다시 한번 말해줄테니 이번엔 잘 듣도록.

1000626309.english: Really? Then tell me what I was talking about.
1000626309.korean: 그래? 그럼 내가 무슨 이야기를 하고 있었는지 말해 봐.

1000626310.english: You don't even remember, let alone understand!

1000626312.english: Just for a minute... Please be quiet, Tomo...
1000626312.korean: 1분 만이라도 좋으니까... 제발 조용히좀 해, 토모...

1000626313.english: You know, when Sherlock gets angry, his face wrinkles and he looks really ugly?
1000626313.korean: 있잖아. 셜록 화낼 때 얼굴에 주름 생겨서 엄~청 못생겨지는 거 알아?

1000626315.english: Sigh... Let's get back to work. This time, listen carefully.
1000626315.korean: 하아... 다시 일로 돌아가지. 이번에야말로 잘 듣도록.

1000626317.english: ...That's for the best. I would have had to explain it at least three times anyway because of Tomo.
1000626317.korean: ...차라리 잘 됐군. 어차피 토모 때문에 최소한 세 번은 설명해야 했을테니까.

1000626318.english: Okay, let's go back to the beginning.

1000626319.english: What we are investigating this time is the 'Red Arena Illegal Gambling Murder Case'.
1000626319.korean: 이번에 우리가 조사하고 있는 건 '붉은 아레나 불법도박 살인사건' 이다.

1000626320.english: ...Does your reaction need to go back to the beginning?

1000626321.english: Ha... Right. I'm talking about the arena where Bioroids created by Densetsu fight each other. I'll show you again.
1000626321.korean: 하아... 그래. 덴세츠에서 만든 바이오로이드 끼리 싸우게 하는 투기장 말이다. 다시 보여주지.

1000626322.english: - Sherlock turned his laptop around and showed me the screen.
1000626322.korean: - 셜록이 노트북을 돌려 나에게 화면을 보여주었다.

1000626323.english: - Some faces are familiar, others are new to him. Every time Sherlock pressed Enter, pictures of bloody fights in the arena flashed by.
1000626323.korean: - 익숙한 얼굴도, 처음보는 얼굴도있다. 셜록이 엔터 키를 누를 때마다 투기장에서 피투성이가 되어 싸우는 사진들이 지나갔다.

1000626324.english: Given its popularity, illegal gambling naturally flourished in the underworld. The victim, Tooru Yamazaki, also ran an illegal gambling website.
1000626324.korean: 인기가 많았던 만큼, 당연히 뒷세계에서 불법 도박이 성행했지. 피해자인 '야마자키 토오루' 또한 불법 도박 사이트를 운영하고 있었다.

1000626325.english: But last week, the victim was found dead in the hallway of the Red Arena stadium.
1000626325.korean: 그런데 지난 주, 피해자는 붉은 아레나 경기장 복도에서 사망한 채로 발견되었다.

1000626326.english: The two stab wounds on either side of the chest made it almost certain that he had been murdered, but no 'human' had entered the area for two hours before and after the estimated time of death.
1000626326.korean: 가슴 양쪽에 남은 두 개의 자상 때문에 누군가에게 살해당한 것이 거의 확실시 되었지만, 사망 추정 시간 전후로 2시간 동안은 그곳에 '인간'의 출입이 없었다고 하더군.

1000626327.english: - After saying that, Sherlock looked at me silently. Does that mean I can ask him anything I'm curious about?
1000626327.korean: - 거기까지 말한 셜록은 말없이 나를 바라보았다. 궁금한게 있으면 물어보라는 뜻인가?

1000626328.english: The victim was sitting, leaning against the wall. The cause of death, as previously stated, was a stab wound.
1000626328.korean: 피해자는 벽에 기댄 채 앉아있었다. 사인을 조금 전에 말한대로 흉기에 의한 자상.

1000626329.english: Since both lungs were punctured, the lungs and chest cavity filled with blood, and he died without being able to scream, so it could be considered as suffocation.
1000626329.korean: 양쪽 폐를 찔리는 바람에 폐와 흉강에 혈액이 가득 차 소리도 못 지르고 죽었으니 질식사라고 볼 수도 있겠군.

1000626330.english: Anyway, because of that, he vomited a lot of blood, and there is a mark left where the criminal covered the victim's mouth with his hand.
1000626330.korean: 어쨌든 그때문에 엄청나게 피를 토해냈는데, 범인이 손으로 피해자의 입을 막은 자국이 남아있다.

1000626331.english: Moreover, considering that the victim died with just two stabs, it is safe to assume that the perpetrator was someone who was familiar with handling knives.
1000626331.korean: 거기다 단 두 번의 칼질로 피해자가 죽음에 이르렀다는 것을 보면 범인은 칼을 다루는 것에 익숙한 자라고 봐도 되겠지.

1000626332.english: And, based on the victim's perspective, the wound on the right side appeared first, and the wound on the other side is tilted to the right, so we can determine that the culprit is left-handed, or at least can skillfully use a knife with his left hand.
1000626332.korean: 그리고 피해자 기준에서 오른쪽 상처가 먼저 생겼고, 반대쪽 상처가 오른쪽으로 기울어 있단 점에서 범인은 왼손잡이, 적어도 왼손으로 칼을 능숙하게 사용할 수 있다는 것까지 특정할 수 있다.

1000626333.english: Unfortunately, there is no CCTV in that hallway, perhaps because they thought it was unnecessary due to the large number of people coming and going.
1000626333.korean: 사람이 많이 들락거려서 필요없다고 생각했는지, 안타깝지만 그 복도에는 CCTV가 없다.

1000626334.english: And that hallway is the only place in the stadium without CCTV.
1000626334.korean: 그리고 그 복도가 경기장에서 CCTV가 없는 유일한 곳이지.

1000626335.english: The killer killed the victim in the middle of a game, the only place without CCTV, in a place that was always crowded but deserted for a moment.
1000626335.korean: 범인은 유일하게 CCTV가 없는 곳에서, 항상 붐비는 와중 단 한 순간 인적이 끊기는 경기 도중에 피해자를 살해했다.

1000626336.english: As a result, you may think that you know the stadium well or that you have prepared very thoroughly.
1000626336.korean: 결과적으로 경기장에 대해 잘 아는 자, 혹은 준비를 매우 철저히 했다고 생각할 수 있다.

1000626338.english: Coincidentally, at the time of the victim's estimated death, an investigation of his property was being conducted at Densetsusha.
1000626338.korean: 공교롭게도 피해자의 사망 추정 시간엔 덴세츠사에서 재물조사가 진행되고 있었다.

1000626339.english: Thanks to this, the entry and exit times of all Bioroids are clearly recorded.
1000626339.korean: 덕분에 소속 바이오로이드의 출입 시간은 모두 명확히 기록되어있지.

1000626340.english: The police investigated all the Bioroids that were in the stadium at the time, but nothing of note was found.
1000626340.korean: 거기에 경찰 측에서 당시 경기장에 있던 모든 바이오로이드를 조사했지만, 별다른 건 나오지 않았다.

1000626342.english: To sum up, there are no witnesses or conclusive evidence. But it's clear this isn't an ordinary murder.
1000626342.korean: 정리하자면, 그 어떠한 목격자도, 결정적인 증거도 없다. 하지만 평범한 살인이 아닌 것은 명백하지.

1000626344.english: Of course, it was stolen from the police.

1000626345.english: Ahaha. Kimura, shouldn't you be going to jail?
1000626345.korean: 아하핫. 키무라, 감옥 가야 되는 거 아냐?

1000626346.english: For the citizens' right to know!

1000626347.english: And the journalism in me is whispering to me to dig into this case!
1000626347.korean: 그리고 내 안의 저널리즘이 이 사건을 파헤치라고 속삭이고 있어!

1000626348.english: A murder case without any evidence. And Sherlock Kimura and the happy Tomo… Is the game's clearing condition to help them solve the case?
1000626348.korean: - 어떤 증거도 없는 살인사건. 그리고 셜록 키무라와 즐거운 토모… 이 게임의 클리어 조건은 이들을 도와 사건을 해결하는 것인 걸까?

1000626349.english: - The condition for clearing this game is to help them solve the case... The gamer inside me whispers.
1000626349.korean: - 이 게임의 클리어 조건은 이들을 도와 사건을 해결하는 것이라고... 내 안의 게이머가 속삭이고 있다.

1000626350.english: - But before that... there's one thing I'd like to confirm.
1000626350.korean: - 하지만 그 전에... 한 가지 확인해보고 싶은 것이 있다.

1000626351.english: What? Isn't it obvious that it's disgusting?

1000626352.english: Only low-quality rascals enjoy such things.
1000626352.korean: 그런 걸 즐기는 건 질 떨어지는 한량들 뿐이다.

1000626354.english: I'll explain, but personally, I don't feel sympathy for the victim. But the incident itself is so unsettling that I have no choice but to investigate.
1000626354.korean: 설명하겠지만, 개인적으로 피해자에게 동정심은 들지 않는다. 하지만 사건 자체가 찝찝하니 조사할 수밖에 없지.

1000626355.english: ...You're acting even weirder today. If you're tired, talk and get some rest.
1000626355.korean: ...자네, 오늘따라 더 이상하군. 피곤하면 말하고 좀 쉬도록.

1000626356.english: Going back, here's what's important now.
1000626356.korean: 다시 돌아가서, 이제 중요한 건 이거다.

1000626357.english: A blue Bible was found in the victim's arms, and a magpie tattoo was found on his forearm.
1000626357.korean: 피해자의 품 속에서 파란 성경책이 발견됐다. 그리고 팔뚝에는 까치 문신이 새겨져있었지.

1000626359.english: Yes. It doesn't appear in the normal Bible.

1000626360.english: Even if it's lower on the priority list, I guess I should investigate it.
1000626360.korean: 우선순위에서 밀릴 지언정 조사를 해보긴 해야겠지.

1000626361.english: The magpie tattoo is the symbol of the Kasahane-gumi, a yakuza group based in this area.
1000626361.korean: 까치 문신은 이 근처를 근거지로 삼은 '카사하네구미'라는 야쿠자 놈들의 상징이다.

1000626362.english: And these guys have been investigated in connection with illegal baseball gambling in the past.
1000626362.korean: 그리고 이놈들은 예전 불법 야구 도박과 관련해서 조사받은 적도 있지.

1000626363.english: This is the basis for the judgment that the victim mentioned earlier was a member of the 'Kasahane-gumi'.
1000626363.korean: 아까 말한 피해자가 '카사하네구미'의 일원이라는 판단의 근거가 이거다.

1000626364.english: Of course, this is all just speculation so far. The rest will ultimately have to be investigated on foot.
1000626364.korean: 물론 지금까지는 전부 추리일 뿐이야. 나머지는 결국 발로 뛰면서 조사할 수밖에 없지.

1000626367.english: Let's get ready and go right away.

1000626369.english: Haam... It's nice here, there are no Metal Parasites...

1000626371.english: Rice, Sergeant... No matter what, it's a mission to escort His Excellency the Commander...
1000626371.korean: 벼, 병장님... 아무리 그래도 사령관 각하 호위 임무인데...

1000626372.english: So you're just lying down and not sleeping...

1000626374.english: What? Just don't make it any bigger than last time. Let's go swimming while singing military songs—
1000626374.korean: 뭐야? 저번처럼 큰 일 아니기만 해봐. 군가부르면서 수영하게 해준-

1000626375.english: Don't let the Metal Parasite rush towards this place!
1000626375.korean: 철충들이 이곳을 향해 달려오고 있지 말입니다!

1000626378.english: What are you doing? Don't be a jerk, just spread the word and get your bearings.
1000626378.korean: 뭐해. 얼타지 말고 상황 전파하고 위치 잡아.

1000626379.english: This is the first time I've seen something so big that Brownie said it was a real big deal...
1000626379.korean: 브라우니가 큰 일이라고 한 게 진짜 큰 일인건 처음보네...

1000626380.english: Hey… did you get it done?

1000626382.english: A communication just came in. They say the situation is over.
1000626382.korean: 방금 통신이 왔어요. 상황 종료라고 합니다.

1000626384.english: But these Iron Bugs... where did they suddenly come from?
1000626384.korean: 그런데 이 철충들... 갑자기 어디서 나타난 걸까요?

1000626386.english: That’s what the higher-ups think, so we just have to do as we’re told and stay on guard— *Yawn*...
1000626386.korean: 그런 건 윗분들이 생각하는 거니까, 우리는 시키는대로 경계나- 하암...

1000626388.english: Sherlock left the old office with Tomo. And...
1000626388.korean: - 셜록, 토모와 함께 낡은 사무실을 나왔다. 그리고...

1000626389.english: A neat city center unfolded before my eyes, instead of the collapsed building debris covered in lush vegetation that I always saw.
1000626389.korean: - 언제나 보던, 무성한 식물로 덮여있던 무너진 건물잔해가 아닌 깔끔한 도심이 눈 앞에 펼쳐졌다.

1000626390.english: On top of that, countless people are roaming the streets. Men and women. Bio-roids and AGSs. A scene where everyone lives intermingled.
1000626390.korean: - 거기다 거리에는 수많은 사람들이 돌아다니고 있다. 남자와 여자. 바이오로이드와 AGS. 모두가 뒤섞여 살아가는 풍경.

1000626391.english: Things that were part of everyday life before the apocalypse feel so fascinating to me.
1000626391.korean: - 멸망 전에는 일상이었던 것들이, 내게는 너무나 신기하게 느껴진다.

1000626393.english: Is there anything you want to buy?

1000626394.english: While I was distracted by the sight of customers and a clerk choosing items inside the store, Sherlock approached and tapped me on the shoulder.
1000626394.korean: - 가게 안에서 물건을 고르는 손님과 점원의 모습에 눈길을 빼앗긴 사이, 다가온 셜록이 내 어깨를 툭 쳤다.

1000626395.english: What's wrong with you since earlier?

1000626396.english: Stay alert. We're storming into the Kasahane-gumi right now.
1000626396.korean: 정신 바짝 차리라고. 우리는 지금 '카사하네구미'에 쳐들어가는 거니까.

1000626397.english: If you don't get your act together, we're finished. You know I'm weak, don't you?
1000626397.korean: 자네가 정신 안차리면 우린 끝장이야. 나 허약한 거 알지 않나.

1000626399.english: Here we go again. Is it fun to tease me like that?

1000626400.english: Pretending to be weak is only fun for a day or two; I saw you running wild...
1000626400.korean: 약한 척 하는 것도 하루이틀이지, 자네가 날뛰는 걸 다 봤는데...

1000626401.english: Hehe, Tomo is a frail high school girl too!

1000626403.english: At that moment, I felt a vibration in my pants. When I put my hand in my pocket, I grabbed something vibrating.
1000626403.korean: - 그 순간, 바지에서 진동이 느껴졌다. 주머니에 손을 넣자 진동하는 무언가가 손에 잡혔다.

1000626404.english: As I placed my hand on the screen, a familiar voice came out.
1000626404.korean: - 액정에 손을 가져다 대자, 익숙한 목소리가 흘러나왔다.

1000626405.english: Oppa, can you hear me well?

1000626406.english: Hehe, I put in some effort to help you, oppa! Now I can contact you like this.
1000626406.korean: 헤헷, 오빠를 도와주려고 힘 좀 썼지! 이제 이렇게 연락할 수 있어.

1000626408.english: When I glanced at him, Sherlock waved his hand as if to say not to worry.
1000626408.korean: - 슬쩍 시선을 주자 셜록은 신경쓰지 말라는 듯 손을 흔들었다.

1000626409.english: I kept a little distance from Sherlock and Tomo and briefly explained what had happened so far.
1000626409.korean: - 셜록과 토모로부터 조금 거리를 두고 지금까지의 일을 간략히 설명했다.

1000626410.english: Hmm... our database only has "Brave Reporter Kimura and Cheerful Tomo Exploited the Kirishima Scandal," so I don't know what will happen next.
1000626410.korean: 흠... 우리 데이터베이스엔 "용감한 기자 키무라와 즐거운 토모가 키리시마 스캔들을 터트렸다" 정도밖에 없어서 앞으로 어떻게 될지는 모르겠어.

1000626411.english: But I am monitoring all of your actions, so if you need any help, you can contact me on that phone.
1000626411.korean: 그래도 오빠의 행동은 전부 모니터링 하고 있으니까, 혹시 도움이 필요하면 그 휴대폰으로 연락하면 돼.

1000626412.english: That's right. The older sisters made a neural sensory synchronization device for you. Soon, other sisters will log into the game to help you.
1000626412.korean: 맞다. 언니들이 신경 감각화 동기화 장치를 만들어줬어. 곧 다른 언니들이 오빠를 도우러 게임에 접속할거야.

1000626413.english: I looked around at the doctor's words.

1000626414.english: That's Joanna and Zero, isn't it?

1000626416.english: Yeah. You're probably right. Because both Joanna and Zero were famous.
1000626416.korean: 응. 오빠의 생각이 맞을 거야. 요안나 언니랑 제로 언니는 둘 다 유명인이었으니까.

1000626417.english: Ah, Sherlock is starting to get anxious. Go quickly.
1000626417.korean: 아, 슬슬 셜록이 초조해하고 있어. 얼른 가봐.

1000626418.english: Hehe. Make sure to contact me if you need help again!
1000626418.korean: 헤헷. 또 도움이 필요하면 꼭 연락하구!

1000626419.english: Watson! Why are you taking this long on the phone!
1000626419.korean: 왓슨! 무슨 통화를 이렇게 오랫동안 하는 거야!

1000626420.english: Ah, look over there! It's cosplay!

1000626421.english: Is it *The Withered Flower of Muromachi* and *Black Shield of Jerusalem*? Densetsu's movies are certainly entertaining.
1000626421.korean: < 시들어버린 무로마치의 꽃 > 과 < 예루살렘의 검은방패 > 인가. 확실히 덴세츠 영화는 재미있지.

1000626422.english: Thanks to that, it also became the world's leading film powerhouse.
1000626422.korean: 덕분에 세계에서 제일 가는 영화 강국이 되기도 했고.

1000626423.english: Then let's move on to the next location, Mr. SMR.
1000626423.korean: 그러면 다음 장소로 움직이죠, SMR 씨.

1000626425.english: Hehe, I'm looking forward to it.

1000626430.english: As the people in cosplay moved, Tomo followed them and disappeared.
1000626430.korean: - 코스프레를 한 인원들이 움직이자 토모가 그들을 따라가 사라져버렸다.

1000626431.english: I forced myself to look away from the fascinating surroundings and decided to follow the two for now.
1000626431.korean: - 신기한 주변에서 억지로 시선을 돌리고 일단 둘을 따라가기로 했다.

1000626432.english: After many twists and turns, we captured Tomo and arrived near the Kasahane-gumi's headquarters.
1000626432.korean: - 우여곡절 끝에 토모를 붙잡고, 카사하네구미의 본거지 근처에 도착했다.

1000626433.english: Tomo, I'm begging you. Please, just stay still.
1000626433.korean: 토모, 부탁이다. 제발 얌전히 좀 있어줘.

1000626434.english: But the quality of those cosplays was no joke!
1000626434.korean: 그치만 저 코스프레들 퀄리티가 장난 아니었단 말이야!

1000626435.english: Light just came out of the shield!

1000626436.english: Yeah, I know. Sumire's year quality was excellent.
1000626436.korean: 그래, 나도 알아. 스미레의 연도 퀄리티가 훌륭했지.

1000626437.english: But your job right now is to be my bodyguard.
1000626437.korean: 그렇지만 지금 네가 할 일은 내 호위라고.

1000626438.english: Ahahaha. Wow, look over there! It's a huge house!
1000626438.korean: 아하하핫. 우와, 저기 봐! 엄청 큰 집이야!

1000626439.english: Let's not even talk about it... Just wait here with Watson.
1000626439.korean: 말을 말자... 여기서 왓슨이랑 같이 기다리고 있어.

1000626440.english: Sherlock turned the corner without hesitation and walked toward the door guarded by menacing men wearing sunglasses.
1000626440.korean: - 셜록은 주저없이 골목을 돌아 선글라스를 낀 험상궂은 남성들이 지키고 있는 문 앞으로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000626441.english: Hello. I'm from BHK. Would it be okay if I interviewed you briefly?
1000626441.korean: 안녕하세요. BHK에서 나왔습니다. 잠깐 인터뷰 좀 괜찮을까요?

1000626443.english: Yes, here's your press ID. It's about Kasahane-gumi...
1000626443.korean: 네, 여기 기자증입니다. 다름이 아니라 카사하네구미에 대해서…

1000626444.english: It sounds like a press ID.

1000626445.english: Dude, when I say nice things to you, just get out of here.
1000626445.korean: 형씨, 좋은 말로 할때 썩 꺼지쇼.

1000626446.english: Okay, just a moment. I should at least tell my superiors that I've received an interview request...
1000626446.korean: 자, 잠깐만요. 인터뷰 요청이 왔다고 윗선에 말이라도...

1000626447.english: This guy really doesn't make sense.

1000626448.english: Regarding Tooru Yamazaki, who was murdered at the Red Arena this time -
1000626448.korean: 이번에 붉은 아레나 경기장에서 살해당한 야마자키 토오루씨에 대해서-

1000626449.english: Okay, wait a minute! I'll go! I'll go!

1000626450.english: - Sherlock, who had escaped from the yakuza who were snapping their knuckles, returned to us who were watching the situation from the corner of the alley.
1000626450.korean: - 손가락 마디를 뚜둑거리는 야쿠자에게서 도망친 셜록이 골목 코너에서 상황을 지켜보고 있던 우리에게 돌아왔다.

1000626451.english: This isn't working. I'll have to find another way.

1000626452.english: Sherlock is too honest. Hahaha, he's so stupid.
1000626452.korean: 셜록은 너무 정직해. 아하핫, 바보 같아.

1000626453.english: If you have a better way, please let me know. I'm thinking about it too.
1000626453.korean: 더 좋은 방법이 있으면 의견이라도 내 봐. 나도 생각중이니까.

1000626454.english: What? How would Tomo know that!

1000626456.english: There are several ways: disguising yourself as a delivery man, bribing the gatekeeper, or...
1000626456.korean: 몇 가지 방법이 있다. 배달부로 변장하거나, 문지기를 매수하거나...

1000626457.english: Well, if that doesn't work out, I guess I'll have to climb over the wall.

1000626458.english: Yeah, that last one was a joke-

1000626461.english: - As if he was trying to run a little, Tomo quickly climbed up onto the wall.
1000626461.korean: - 살짝 도움닫기를 하나 싶더니, 토모는 순식간에 담 위에 올라섰다.

1000626462.english: Sleep- Tomo! What are you doing!

1000626464.english: I told you that was just a joke! It was home invasion!

1000626465.english: I'll open it for you from the inside!

1000626468.english: - Sherlock, groaning, climbed up the wall, following Tomo who had disappeared inside the wall.
1000626468.korean: - 담장 안쪽으로 사라져버린 토모를 따라 셜록도 끙끙대며 담을 기어 올라가 버렸다.

1000626469.english: - Tomo's laughter and Sherlock's desperate cries faded away, and soon a commotion arose inside.
1000626469.korean: - 토모의 웃음소리와 셜록의 처절한 외침이 멀어지고, 곧 안쪽에서 소란이 일어났다.

1000626471.english: - Just in case, I decided to watch the situation from outside.
1000626471.korean: - 혹시 모르니 일단 밖에서 상황을 지켜보기로 했다.

1000626472.english: - I sat with my back against the wall and took in the vibrant street view.
1000626472.korean: - 담에 등을 기대고 앉아 생동감 넘치는 거리를 눈에 담았다.

1000626474.korean: - 흠집 하나 없는 깔끔한 건물들, 반짝이는 유리창.

1000626475.english: On top of that, even the cars driving on the road...

1000626477.english: Right. With the team by my side, surely...

1000626480.english: I was awakened from my thoughts by Sherlock's desperate scream. I don't know how actual history unfolded, but if Sherlock gets caught, it doesn't look like it will end well.
1000626480.korean: - 셜록의 처절한 비명에 상념에서 깨어났다. 실제 역사는 어떻게 흘러갔는지 모르겠지만, 셜록이 잡혀버리면 좋게 끝날 것 같지는 않다.

1000626481.english: When I climbed over the wall and entered the house, Tomo and Sherlock were being chased by the Yakuza.
1000626481.korean: - 담을 넘어 집안에 들어가니 토모와 셜록이 야쿠자들에게 쫓기고 있었다.

1000626482.english: Watson! Don't just stand there watching, help me quickly!
1000626482.korean: 왓슨! 보고 있지만 말고 빨리 도와줘!

1000626483.english: Finally, the time has come to show off the martial arts skills I learned from Tiechen for two hours.
1000626483.korean: - 드디어 티에치엔에게 두 시간 동안 사사받은 내 무술 실력을 보여줄 때가 왔다.

1000626484.english: - As I climbed over the wall a moment ago, I also realized that the specs of this body aren't much different from my original one. Then, just like this...!
1000626484.korean: - 조금 전 담을 넘을 때, 이 신체의 스펙은 내 원래 몸과 크게 다르지 않다는 것도 파악했다. 그럼 이대로...!

1000626485.english: What is this? I'll take care of you too—

1000626487.english: Before the punch thrown with all its might could even land, the Yakuza flew far away.
1000626487.korean: - 힘껏 날린 주먹이 닿기도 전에, 야쿠자는 저 멀리 날아가버렸다.

1000626488.english: That's amazing. You've gotten stronger than before, haven't you?

1000626489.english: Is this also the martial art he said he learned in the army?

1000626492.english: A voice was heard from an empty space, causing me to jump in surprise.
1000626492.korean: - 아무것도 없는 공간에서 목소리가 들려와 펄쩍 뛰며 놀라고 말았다.

1000626493.english: I, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to surprise you...

1000626494.english: That's right. I volunteered to join to help the Commander, as I can hide my appearance.
1000626494.korean: 맞다. 사령관을 돕기 위해 모습을 숨길 수 있는 내가 자원해서 들어왔다.

1000626496.english: I volunteered to come in to help the commander, as I can hide my appearance.
1000626496.korean: 사령관을 돕기 위해 모습을 숨길 수 있는 내가 자원해서 들어왔다.

1000626497.english: You don't have to worry anymore. I will protect the commander.
1000626497.korean: 이제 걱정하지 않아도 된다. 내가 사령관을 지키겠다.

1000626498.english: Meanwhile, Tomo was running around the house, wreaking havoc, and fleeing from the Yakuza.
1000626498.korean: - 한편 토모는 여기저기 집안을 휘젓고 다니며 야쿠자들에게 도망치고 있었다.

1000626499.english: Ahahaha. Baldy! Catch me if you can!

1000626503.english: As the heated Yakuza pulled out his gun, the security guard AGS also aimed his gun at Tomo.
1000626503.korean: - 잔뜩 열이 오른 야쿠자가 총을 꺼냄과 동시에, 경비 AGS도 토모에게 총구를 겨눴다.

1000626504.english: I pulled Tomo by the hand and looked for Sherlock, but he was nowhere to be seen.
1000626504.korean: - 토모의 손을 끌며 셜록을 찾았지만 그의 모습은 어디도 보이지 않았다.

1000626506.english: The Yakuza who had been aiming their guns were all flying in all directions.
1000626506.korean: - 총구를 겨누던 야쿠자들은 전부 이리저리 날아가고 있었다.

1000626507.english: However, only the AGS are still chasing us.
1000626507.korean: - 다만 AGS들만은 여전히 우리를 쫓고 있다.

1000626508.english: Ugh, I'm so tired... I'm going to stop running...

1000626509.english: Hehehe... Even though Tomo is a bioroid, her stamina is weak...

1000626510.english: Commander, I'll take charge of this place.

1000626511.english: Leaving the race to pull the trigger on the AGS behind, I continued running with Tomo.
1000626511.korean: - AGS들을 향해 방아쇠를 당기는 레이스를 뒤로하고 토모와 함께 계속 달렸다.

1000626512.english: Thanks to the race, I was barely able to shake off even the AGSs.
1000626512.korean: - 레이스 덕분에 겨우 AGS들까지 따돌릴 수 있었다.

1000626513.english: However, the moment I turned the corner of the garden, I came face-to-face with a huge number of Yakuza.
1000626513.korean: - 그러나 정원 코너를 돈 순간, 어마어마한 수의 야쿠자들과 마주치고 말았다.

1000626514.english: Did you think you could get out? Huh?
1000626514.korean: 빠져나갈 수 있을 줄 알았냐? 아앙?

1000626515.english: I've been annoyed enough lately, you know. These guys are stressing me out—
1000626515.korean: 안그래도 요새 짜증났는데 말야. 이녀석들로 스트레스를-

1000626518.english: The yakuza members bowed in unison to the stern-looking old man with a sword. An expensive-looking gold watch gleamed on the old man's right wrist.
1000626518.korean: - 검을 찬 강직해보이는 노인에게 야쿠자들이 일제히 고개를 숙였다. 노인의 오른 손목에는 비싸보이는 금시계가 반짝였다.

1000626519.english: You fools. Can't you act a little more like gentlemen?
1000626519.korean: 멍청한 놈들. 좀 더 신사답게 굴지 못하겠느냐?

1000626521.english: The Yakuza knelt before the old man.

1000626522.english: Tsk tsk. Go stand that fallen pine tree up again.
1000626522.korean: 쯧쯧. 가서 쓰러진 소나무나 다시 세우거라.

1000626523.english: I am sorry about this, gentlemen thieves. Our kids are young, so they are a bit immature.
1000626523.korean: 이거 미안하게 됐소이다, 도둑 양반들. 우리 애들이 젊다 보니 철이 좀 없지.

1000626525.english: And we aren't thieves, we're reporters. Would you mind a brief interview?
1000626525.korean: 그리고 저희는 도둑이 아니라 기자인데, 잠깐 인터뷰 괜찮으실까요?

1000626526.english: Sherlock, who had suddenly popped out of the pond, asked for an interview again with a cheerful face.
1000626526.korean: - 갑자기 연못에서 튀어나온 셜록이 싹싹한 얼굴로 또다시 인터뷰를 요청했다.

1000626528.english: Well, at least I'm good at surviving.
1000626528.korean: 뭐, 나는 생존력 하나 만큼은 좋으니까.

1000626529.english: The old man opened his mouth to Sherlock without even blinking an eyebrow.
1000626529.korean: - 노인은 그런 셜록에게 눈썹 하나 까딱하지 않고 입을 열었다.

1000626530.english: So you were a reporter, sir.

1000626533.english: I was guided inside the house. I looked around while drinking the tea brought by someone who appeared to be a servant.
1000626533.korean: - 안내를 받아 집 안으로 들어왔다. 하인으로 보이는 이가 가져온 차를 마시며 주변을 둘러보았다.

1000626534.english: In the neatly organized room, several paintings of magpies and pigeons are hanging. And what is that...?
1000626534.korean: - 깨끗하게 정리된 방에는 몇 개의 까치와 비둘기 그림들이 걸려있다. 그리고 저건...?

1000626535.english: Wow, it's Laviata! Grandpa, do you like Laviata too?

1000626536.english: Ah, you mean that one? Most of the paintings in this mansion were gifts, but I hung that Laviata bromide myself.
1000626536.korean: 아, 저거 말인가. 이 저택에 있는 그림들은 대부분 선물 받은 거네만, 저 라비아타 브로마이드만은 내가 걸었지.

1000626537.english: Anyway, I apologize once again for what happened a little while ago. My kids are a bit hot-tempered, you know.
1000626537.korean: 그나저나 조금 전 일은 다시 한 번 사과하겠네. 우리 애들이 좀 다혈질이라서 말이야.

1000626538.english: No, it's fine. My child was at fault first.
1000626538.korean: 아뇨, 괜찮습니다. 저희 애가 먼저 잘못했으니까요.

1000626541.english: Okay, then let's just let this slide. As you know, I'm a bit uncomfortable around the police.
1000626541.korean: 좋아, 그럼 이 일은 서로 넘어가는 걸로 합세. 자네도 알겠지만 나는 경찰은 조금 불편하니까.

1000626542.english: Then... let's start that so-called interview, Mr. Reporter.
1000626542.korean: 그러면... 그 인터뷰라는 걸 시작하지, 기자 양반.

1000626543.english: By any chance... do you know Mr. Toru Yamazaki?
1000626543.korean: 혹시... 야마자키 토오루 씨에 대해 아십니까?

1000626545.english: Ah, are you perhaps talking about that newcomer, Tooru?
1000626545.korean: 아, 혹시 그 신참 토오루 군을 말하는 건가?

1000626546.english: I don't know who did that, but it's a shame because he was a promising child.
1000626546.korean: 누가 그런 짓을 했는지는 모르겠지만, 장래가 유망한 아이였는데 안타깝게 됐어.

1000626547.english: What position did Mr. Toru Yamazaki hold? And to what extent is the Kasahane-gumi involved in the Red Arena gambling?
1000626547.korean: 야마자키 토오루 씨는 어떤 위치의 사람이였습니까? 그리고 카사하네구미는 붉은 아레나 도박에 얼마나 관여하고 계십니까?

1000626548.english: He wasn't originally part of our family. We just took in a guy who came from another organization.
1000626548.korean: 그녀석은 원래 우리 가족이 아니었네. 다른 조직에서 나온 녀석을 받아들인거지.

1000626549.english: Of course, he was just a low-ranking errand boy.

1000626550.english: see. In that case, what was your reason for getting involved in the Red Arena gambling?
1000626550.korean: 그렇군요. 그렇다면 붉은 아레나 도박에 손을 댄 이유는 무엇 때문이시죠?

1000626551.english: Gambling? Well... we don't touch anything other than legal pachinko, though.
1000626551.korean: 도박? 글쎄... 우린 합법적인 파칭코 외엔 손대고있지 않다만.

1000626552.english: It’s alright, sir. We aren’t the police or detectives. We just want the truth about the murder case.
1000626552.korean: 선생님, 괜찮습니다. 저흰 경찰이나 탐정 같은 게 아니에요. 그저 살인 사건에 대한 진실을 원할 뿐입니다.

1000626554.english: The old man's gaze turned cold in an instant. Sherlock broke out in a sweat but did not take his eyes off him.
1000626554.korean: - 노인의 눈빛이 순간 차가워졌다. 셜록은 진땀을 흘리면서도 그에게서 눈을 돌리지 않았다.

1000626555.english: A bone-chilling silence continued for a while, and the old man chuckled and picked up his teacup.
1000626555.korean: - 살떨리는 침묵이 얼마간 이어지고, 노인이 피식 웃으며 찻잔을 들었다.

1000626556.english: Will you promise not to tell anyone outside? Of course, recording is also prohibited.
1000626556.korean: 외부에 발설하지 않겠다고 약속해주겠나? 당연히 녹음도 불가일세.

1000626558.english: Sherlock took a tape recorder out of his pocket and placed it on the table. As if that wasn't enough, the Yakuza approached, searched us, and then left.
1000626558.korean: - 셜록이 품 속에서 녹음기를 꺼내 탁자에 내려놓았다. 그걸로는 모자랐는지, 야쿠자들이 다가와 우리의 몸을 수색한 후 물러갔다.

1000626560.english: don't know which bastard killed my child, but I won't let them get away with it! You rotten son of a bitch!
1000626560.korean: 어떤 자식이 우리 애를 죽였는지 모르겠지만 가만두지 않겠어! 썩을 자식같으니!

1000626562.english: Given the times, I was going to leave it up to the police...
1000626562.korean: 시대가 시대인 만큼 참고 경찰 측에 맡기려 했는데 말이야...

1000626563.english: But you know what? Those damn cops are claiming they have no evidence. Those damned bastards!
1000626563.korean: 그런데 알고 있나? 그 경찰 놈들이 아무런 증거가 없다고 뻗대고 있더군. 망할 짭새 새끼들이 말이야!

1000626564.english: Are you asking if we know the truth? We're the ones who want to know!
1000626564.korean: 진실을 아냐고 물었나? 알고 싶은 건 우리들일세!

1000626565.english: - Kasasagi's anger wasn't specifically directed at us, but the eyes of the surrounding yakuza became fierce.
1000626565.korean: - 카사사기의 노여움은 딱히 우리를 향하고 있진 않았지만, 주변 야쿠자들의 눈빛이 험악해졌다.

1000626566.english: - Sherlock is stiff and tense, and Tomo is... chasing butterflies in the yard, laughing out loud.
1000626566.korean: - 셜록은 잔뜩 긴장해서 뻣뻣하게 굳어 있고, 토모는... 꺄르르 웃으며 마당에서 나비를 쫓아다니고 있다.

1000626567.english: - I feel like this is a situation where I have to step in. What should I do...
1000626567.korean: - 아무래도 내가 나서야 할 상황인 것 같다. 어떻게 할까...

1000626568.english: Huh. Our company is a company. It's changed with the times.
1000626568.korean: 흥. 우리 구미는 기업일세. 시대의 흐름에 따라 변화한거지.

1000626569.english: Did you think the yakuza would just start fights and threaten merchants to collect rent? There are plenty of ways to make a lot of money.
1000626569.korean: 야쿠자라고 해서 패싸움이나 벌이고 상인들을 협박해서 자릿세를 받아낼 줄 알았나? 큰 돈을 벌 방법은 얼마든지 있네.

1000626570.english: Red Arena has already become popular worldwide. We're just riding that wave.
1000626570.korean: 붉은 아레나는 이미 전 세계적으로 인기를 얻었네. 우리는 그 흐름에 편승했을 뿐이야.

1000626571.english: And Tooru-kun was in a mid-level management position in that case. It's only natural for young people to be thinking in that direction.
1000626571.korean: 그리고 토오루 군은 그 건에서 중간관리직을 맏고 있었네. 젊은 친구들이 그런 쪽으로 머리굴리는 건 제격이니까.

1000626573.english: Well, I don't care if you gossip. Just weigh the cost of your lives against the cost of covering up a single piece of trash.
1000626573.korean: 뭐, 떠벌린다고 해도 상관 없다네. 자네들 목숨값과 우리가 찌라시 하나를 무마하는 비용을 잘 재어보게.

1000626574.english: Oh, don't worry. I keep my promises unless it's something really big.
1000626574.korean: 거, 걱정 마시죠. 정말 큰 일이 아니라면 약속은 지킵니다.

1000626577.english: It would be better for your health if you didn't even think about running away.
1000626577.korean: 도망갈 생각은 하지 않는 게 신상에 좋을 걸세.

1000626578.english: I went out into the hallway and pulled out my phone to ask the doctor for help. But...
1000626578.korean: - 닥터에게 도움을 청하기 위해 복도로 나와 휴대폰을 꺼냈다. 그런데...

1000626579.english: - I had heard of the cell phones used in the past, and had seen some of the agents carrying them around, but I didn't know how to use them.
1000626579.korean: - 과거 사용되던 휴대폰이란 것에 대해 들어본 적도 있고, 일부 대원들이 가지고 다니는 것도 본 적 있지만 정작 사용법은 모르고 있었다.
